variants: Sable Merriweather is a neuropsychology expert residing in Dovewood Enclave. She is recognized for her innovative contributions, including the creation of the Glowstone Reflection Engine, which has advanced her field significantly. As an active member of the Hallowed Vine Conservationists, Sable dedicates her efforts to environmental preservation. Her achievements were honored with the Cobalt Vow Medallion, reflecting her commitment to both scientific and ecological advancements. Through her multifaceted work, she fosters a connection between neuroscience and nature.
